name: Vendas Mensais
description: Evolução mensal das vendas nos últimos 12 meses
naturalLanguage: Total de vendas por mês nos últimos 12 meses
sql: SELECT TOP 1000 FORMAT(cd.Data, 'yyyy-MM') AS Mes, COUNT(*) AS NumDocumentos, SUM(cd.TotalDocumento) AS TotalVendas, AVG(cd.TotalDocumento) AS MediaPorDocumento FROM CabecDoc cd WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN CabecDocStatus cds WITH (NOLOCK) ON cds.IdCabecDoc = cd.Id WHERE cd.TipoDoc IN ('FA', 'VD') AND cds.Anulado = 0 AND cd.Data >= DATEADD(MONTH, -12, GETDATE()) GROUP BY FORMAT(cd.Data, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY Mes ASC

name: Top 20 Clientes
description: Os 20 clientes com maior volume de faturação este ano
naturalLanguage: Top 20 clientes por faturação este ano
sql: SELECT TOP 20 cd.Entidade AS CodigoCliente, cd.Nome AS Cliente, COUNT(*) AS NumDocumentos, SUM(cd.TotalDocumento) AS TotalFaturado FROM CabecDoc cd WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN CabecDocStatus cds WITH (NOLOCK) ON cds.IdCabecDoc = cd.Id WHERE cd.TipoDoc IN ('FA', 'VD') AND cds.Anulado = 0 AND YEAR(cd.Data) = YEAR(GETDATE()) GROUP BY cd.Entidade, cd.Nome ORDER BY TotalFaturado DESC

name: Saldos Pendentes
description: Aging de contas a receber por escalão de antiguidade
naturalLanguage: Saldos pendentes de clientes agrupados por antiguidade (0-30, 30-60, 60-90, 90+ dias)
sql: SELECT TOP 1000 CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, p.DataVenc, GETDATE()) <= 30 THEN '0-30 dias' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, p.DataVenc, GETDATE()) <= 60 THEN '30-60 dias' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, p.DataVenc, GETDATE()) <= 90 THEN '60-90 dias' ELSE '90+ dias' END AS Escalao, COUNT(*) AS NumDocumentos, SUM(p.ValorPendente) AS TotalPendente FROM Pendentes p WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE p.TipoEntidade = 'C' AND p.ValorPendente > 0 GROUP BY CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, p.DataVenc, GETDATE()) <= 30 THEN '0-30 dias' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, p.DataVenc, GETDATE()) <= 60 THEN '30-60 dias' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, p.DataVenc, GETDATE()) <= 90 THEN '60-90 dias' ELSE '90+ dias' END ORDER BY MIN(DATEDIFF(DAY, p.DataVenc, GETDATE())) ASC

name: Receitas vs Despesas
description: Comparação mensal entre receitas e despesas (demonstração de resultados simplificada)
naturalLanguage: Receitas vs despesas por mês no ano corrente
sql: SELECT TOP 12 ac.Moeda, N AS Mes, SUM(CASE WHEN ac.Conta LIKE '7%' THEN CASE WHEN N = 1 THEN ac.Mes01CR - ac.Mes01DB WHEN N = 2 THEN ac.Mes02CR - ac.Mes02DB WHEN N = 3 THEN ac.Mes03CR - ac.Mes03DB WHEN N = 4 THEN ac.Mes04CR - ac.Mes04DB WHEN N = 5 THEN ac.Mes05CR - ac.Mes05DB WHEN N = 6 THEN ac.Mes06CR - ac.Mes06DB WHEN N = 7 THEN ac.Mes07CR - ac.Mes07DB WHEN N = 8 THEN ac.Mes08CR - ac.Mes08DB WHEN N = 9 THEN ac.Mes09CR - ac.Mes09DB WHEN N = 10 THEN ac.Mes10CR - ac.Mes10DB WHEN N = 11 THEN ac.Mes11CR - ac.Mes11DB WHEN N = 12 THEN ac.Mes12CR - ac.Mes12DB END ELSE 0 END) AS Receitas, SUM(CASE WHEN ac.Conta LIKE '6%' THEN CASE WHEN N = 1 THEN ac.Mes01DB - ac.Mes01CR WHEN N = 2 THEN ac.Mes02DB - ac.Mes02CR WHEN N = 3 THEN ac.Mes03DB - ac.Mes03CR WHEN N = 4 THEN ac.Mes04DB - ac.Mes04CR WHEN N = 5 THEN ac.Mes05DB - ac.Mes05CR WHEN N = 6 THEN ac.Mes06DB - ac.Mes06CR WHEN N = 7 THEN ac.Mes07DB - ac.Mes07CR WHEN N = 8 THEN ac.Mes08DB - ac.Mes08CR WHEN N = 9 THEN ac.Mes09DB - ac.Mes09CR WHEN N = 10 THEN ac.Mes10DB - ac.Mes10CR WHEN N = 11 THEN ac.Mes11DB - ac.Mes11CR WHEN N = 12 THEN ac.Mes12DB - ac.Mes12CR END ELSE 0 END) AS Despesas FROM AcumuladosContas ac WITH (NOLOCK) CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1 AS N UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12) Meses WHERE ac.Ano = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND (ac.Conta LIKE '6%' OR ac.Conta LIKE '7%') AND ac.TipoLancamento = 'N' GROUP BY ac.Moeda, N HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN ac.Conta LIKE '7%' THEN CASE WHEN N = 1 THEN ac.Mes01CR - ac.Mes01DB WHEN N = 2 THEN ac.Mes02CR - ac.Mes02DB WHEN N = 3 THEN ac.Mes03CR - ac.Mes03DB WHEN N = 4 THEN ac.Mes04CR - ac.Mes04DB WHEN N = 5 THEN ac.Mes05CR - ac.Mes05DB WHEN N = 6 THEN ac.Mes06CR - ac.Mes06DB WHEN N = 7 THEN ac.Mes07CR - ac.Mes07DB WHEN N = 8 THEN ac.Mes08CR - ac.Mes08DB WHEN N = 9 THEN ac.Mes09CR - ac.Mes09DB WHEN N = 10 THEN ac.Mes10CR - ac.Mes10DB WHEN N = 11 THEN ac.Mes11CR - ac.Mes11DB WHEN N = 12 THEN ac.Mes12CR - ac.Mes12DB END ELSE 0 END) <> 0 OR SUM(CASE WHEN ac.Conta LIKE '6%' THEN CASE WHEN N = 1 THEN ac.Mes01DB - ac.Mes01CR WHEN N = 2 THEN ac.Mes02DB - ac.Mes02CR WHEN N = 3 THEN ac.Mes03DB - ac.Mes03CR WHEN N = 4 THEN ac.Mes04DB - ac.Mes04CR WHEN N = 5 THEN ac.Mes05DB - ac.Mes05CR WHEN N = 6 THEN ac.Mes06DB - ac.Mes06CR WHEN N = 7 THEN ac.Mes07DB - ac.Mes07CR WHEN N = 8 THEN ac.Mes08DB - ac.Mes08CR WHEN N = 9 THEN ac.Mes09DB - ac.Mes09CR WHEN N = 10 THEN ac.Mes10DB - ac.Mes10CR WHEN N = 11 THEN ac.Mes11DB - ac.Mes11CR WHEN N = 12 THEN ac.Mes12DB - ac.Mes12CR END ELSE 0 END) <> 0 ORDER BY Mes

name: Quadro de Pessoal
description: Funcionários activos por departamento com custo salarial total
naturalLanguage: Número de funcionários e custo salarial total por departamento
sql: SELECT TOP 1000 d.Descricao AS Departamento, COUNT(*) AS NumFuncionarios, SUM(f.VencimentoMensal) AS CustoMensal, AVG(f.VencimentoMensal) AS MediaSalarial, MIN(f.DataAdmissao) AS AdmissaoMaisAntiga, MAX(f.DataAdmissao) AS AdmissaoMaisRecente FROM Funcionarios f WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN Departamentos d WITH (NOLOCK) ON d.Departamento = f.CodDepartamento WHERE f.DataDemissao IS NULL OR f.DataDemissao > GETDATE() GROUP BY d.Descricao ORDER BY NumFuncionarios DESC
